name: Megazone Cloud
description: Megazone Cloud, Koreas largest AWS/Azure/GCP MSP, provides SpaceCore FinOps and CloudPlex management platforms.

seo.title: Megazone Cloud — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Megazone Cloud: Megazone Cloud, Koreas largest AWS/Azure/GCP MSP, provides SpaceCore FinOps and CloudPlex management platforms.

when_to_use: FinOps cost management across AWS, Azure, and GCP
SpaceCore dashboards for cloud spend optimization
Korean enterprise cloud management with MSP support

pros: Korea's largest cloud MSP with deep AWS expertise
SpaceCore FinOps for multi-cloud cost control
cons: Primarily a services company, not product SaaS
Tooling rarely sold standalone outside MSP deals
Limited relevance outside Korea and APAC
review.verdict: Dominant Korean MSP with decent FinOps tooling, but buy the services not the products alone.
review.best_for: Korean and APAC enterprises needing full-service cloud MSP with FinOps tooling.
review.not_for: Teams outside APAC or wanting best-of-breed product SaaS.
